response.justification: While the candidate has broad full-stack experience and notable open-source geospatial contributions via GISCollective, they lack direct C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing/navigation pipelines, show no evidence of distributed systems or geospatial tile processing, and their technical focus is primarily on JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang — none of which align with the core requirement of modern C++ for routing tile pipelines.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Active contributor to developer tooling and testing frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, routing tiles, or geospatial data optimization
Primary stack (JS/TS/DLang) does not match required C++ focus for the role
